recommendations.title: The Nile Hilton Incident
recommendations.overview: Cairo, 2011. A police officer investigates the murder of a woman in a luxurious hotel in the days leading up to the Egyptian revolution.

recommendations.title: The Contractor
recommendations.overview: After being involuntarily discharged from the U.S. Special Forces, James Harper decides to support his family by joining a private contracting organization alongside his best friend and under the command of a fellow veteran. Overseas on a covert miss

recommendations.title: Cairo Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A fisherman's son is offered the ultimate privilege to study at the Al-Azhar University in Cairo, the epicenter of power of Sunni Islam. Shortly after his arrival, the university’s highest ranking religious leader, the Grand Imam, dies and the young

recommendations.title: Patema Inverted
recommendations.overview: A young girl, from a civilization that resides in deep underground tunnels, finds herself trapped in an inverted world and teams up with a resident to escape and return home.

recommendations.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit
recommendations.overview: 'Toon star Roger is worried that his wife Jessica is playing pattycake with someone else, so the studio hires detective Eddie Valiant to snoop on her. But the stakes are quickly raised when Marvin Acme is found dead and Roger is the prime suspect.

recommendations.title: North by Northwest
recommendations.overview: Advertising man Roger Thornhill is mistaken for a spy, triggering a deadly cross-country chase.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.

recommendations.title: Catacombs
recommendations.overview: A young woman in Paris goes to a party in the enormous labyrinth of limestone tunnels beneath Paris. When she becomes separated from her friends, she is convinced something is chasing her through the dark tunnels.

recommendations.title: Dark Days
recommendations.overview: A cinematic portrait of the homeless population who live permanently in the underground tunnels of New York City.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.
